simpleDefinition: a strip of leather or material worn around the waist
exampleSentence: He wears a brown leather belt with his jeans.
exampleThai: เขาใส่เข็มขัดหนังสีน้ำตาลกับกางเกงยีนส์ของเขา
imagePrompt: A classic brown leather belt with a silver buckle, placed on a white surface

simpleDefinition: a long, thin piece of cloth worn around the neck
exampleSentence: He wore a red tie to the wedding.
exampleThai: เขาใส่เนคไทสีแดงไปงานแต่งงาน
imagePrompt: A red silk tie perfectly knotted, against a white background

simpleDefinition: a piece of cloth worn around the neck or head for warmth or decoration
exampleSentence: She wrapped a wool scarf around her neck.
exampleThai: เธอพันผ้าพันคอขนสัตว์รอบคอของเธอ
imagePrompt: A warm, knitted wool scarf in a bright yellow color

simpleDefinition: coverings for the hands and fingers
exampleSentence: I need to wear gloves because it is very cold.
exampleThai: ฉันต้องใส่ถุงมือเพราะอากาศหนาวมาก
imagePrompt: A pair of thick winter gloves on a snowy surface

simpleDefinition: a covering for the head
exampleSentence: He put on his hat before going out in the sun.
exampleThai: เขาสวมหมวกก่อนออกไปเจอแดด
imagePrompt: A stylish summer straw hat with a wide brim

simpleDefinition: a type of hat with a curved front part
exampleSentence: The boy was wearing a baseball cap.
exampleThai: เด็กผู้ชายสวมหมวกแก๊ปเบสบอล
imagePrompt: A blue baseball cap with a white logo on the front

thaiMeaning: แว่นตากันแดด
simpleDefinition: dark glasses that protect your eyes from the sun
exampleSentence: She never leaves the house without her sunglasses.
exampleThai: เธอไม่เคยออกจากบ้านโดยไม่มีแว่นตากันแดดเลย
imagePrompt: A pair of stylish black sunglasses on a sandy beach

simpleDefinition: two lenses in a frame that you wear on your nose to help you see
exampleSentence: I need my glasses to read this book.
exampleThai: ฉันต้องใช้แว่นตาเพื่ออ่านหนังสือเล่มนี้
imagePrompt: A pair of reading glasses with black frames on an open book

thaiMeaning: นาฬิกาข้อมือ
simpleDefinition: a small clock that you wear on your wrist
exampleSentence: He looked at his watch to check the time.
exampleThai: เขามองดูนาฬิกาข้อมือของเขาเพื่อเช็คเวลา
imagePrompt: A classic silver wristwatch with a leather strap on a table

simpleDefinition: a small circular band worn on a finger
exampleSentence: She wears a gold ring on her right hand.
exampleThai: เธอสวมแหวนทองที่มือขวาของเธอ
imagePrompt: A shiny gold ring with a small diamond on a velvet cushion

simpleDefinition: a piece of jewelry worn around the neck
exampleSentence: He bought her a beautiful pearl necklace.
exampleThai: เขาซื้อสร้อยคอไข่มุกที่สวยงามให้เธอ
imagePrompt: A beautiful pearl necklace resting on a soft pink background

simpleDefinition: jewelry worn on the ears
exampleSentence: She was wearing silver earrings.
exampleThai: เธอใส่ต่างหูเงิน
imagePrompt: A pair of shiny silver earrings with small crystals

thaiMeaning: สร้อยข้อมือ
simpleDefinition: a piece of jewelry worn around the wrist
exampleSentence: She gave me a silver bracelet for my birthday.
exampleThai: เธอให้สร้อยข้อมือเงินฉันเป็นของขวัญวันเกิด
imagePrompt: A delicate silver bracelet with small charms on a wooden surface

thaiMeaning: รองเท้าบูท
simpleDefinition: a type of shoe that covers the whole foot and the lower leg
exampleSentence: You should wear boots when walking in the snow.

thaiMeaning: รองเท้าแตะรัดส้น

simpleDefinition: soft coverings for the feet worn inside shoes

simpleDefinition: a piece of women's clothing that tightly covers the legs

simpleDefinition: a natural cloth made from a plant, used to make soft clothes

simpleDefinition: a smooth, shiny cloth made by silkworms

simpleDefinition: animal skin used to make shoes, bags, or clothes

simpleDefinition: thick hair of a sheep, used to make warm clothes

simpleDefinition: a strong cotton cloth used especially to make jeans

thaiMeaning: กระเป๋าใส่เหรียญ (สำหรับผู้หญิง)

thaiMeaning: กระเป๋าสตางค์

thaiMeaning: กระเป๋าเป้

simpleDefinition: an object that protects you from the rain or sun

simpleDefinition: a metal or plastic device used to open and close clothes or bags

simpleDefinition: a small round piece used to fasten clothes

thaiMeaning: กระเป๋าเสื้อหรือกางเกง

simpleDefinition: the part of a shirt that goes around the neck

simpleDefinition: the part of clothing that covers your arm

simpleDefinition: a small piece of metal used to hold hair in place

simpleDefinition: a band worn around the head to keep hair off the face

simpleDefinition: a piece of jewelry worn on a dress or jacket

simpleDefinition: a piece of jewelry that hangs from a chain around the neck

simpleDefinition: a strong artificial material used to make clothes, ropes, and bags
